div1.entryFree: Indulgence, leniency, connivance: of partial i. to their benumbed wills, Troil. II, 2, 178. In the Roman Catholic church, == absolution from censure and punishment: as you from crimes would pardoned be, let your i. set me free, Tp. Epil. Troil. II, 2, 178 givest whores --s to sin, H6A I, 3, 35.
